title: UiPath Object Repository Inventory
description: Inventory of UiPath Studio UI descriptor objects discovered from a project's .objects/ directory tree. Schema version v0.1.2. Covers ScreenEntry (descriptor V2) and ElementEntry (descriptor V6).

entries.description: Flat list of all Screen and Element entries discovered in the project.

reference.description: Globally unique object identity: '<library-prefix>/<object-id>'. Null for library root.

screenshot_filename.description: Basename of screenshot in .screenshots/. Pattern: 32 hex chars + extension.

uix_selector.description: UiPath UIX selector XML fragment or parameterized string.Format expression.

audit_fields.description: Audit metadata present on all entry types.

screen_entry.description: UiPath Screen descriptor. Adapter version V2. XML root: ObjectRepositoryScreenData / TargetApp.

parent_ref.description: Reference to the parent AppVersion node.

url.description: Application URL matched at automation time. May be parameterized with [varName] or string.Format syntax.

status.description: hardcoded = literal URL. parameterized = contains variable placeholder.

variable_name.description: Variable name when status=parameterized (V2 [varName] syntax). Null when hardcoded.

selector.description: Top-level window/browser selector (Selector attribute on TargetApp).

descriptor_version.description: UiPath Object Repository descriptor version as stored in .metadata (e.g. 'V1', 'V2'). Adapter V2 handles formats V1 and V2.

declared_variables.description: ObjectRepositoryVariableData entries declared on this screen.

element_entry.description: UiPath Element descriptor. Adapter version V6. XML root: ObjectRepositoryTargetData / TargetAnchorable.

parent_ref.description: Reference to parent Screen or parent Element (nested elements).

element_name.description: Human-readable descriptor name shown in UiPath Studio Object Repository panel.

activity_type.description: UiPath activity hint stored in <x:String x:Key="ActivityType">. 'None' when unset.

search_steps.description: Comma-separated targeting strategies. First token is primary.

scope_selector.description: ScopeSelectorArgument: narrowed window/browser scope for evaluation of full_selector.

full_selector.description: FullSelectorArgument: element selector relative to scope_selector.

browser_url.description: BrowserURL attribute — informational only, not used for targeting.

fuzzy_selector.description: FuzzySelectorArgument — fuzzy-match variant. Empty string when absent.

has_image.description: True when ImageBase64 attribute is present and non-empty (image fallback capture exists).

has_cv.description: True when CVScreenId attribute is present and non-empty (Computer Vision descriptor attached).

cv_type.description: CvType attribute value. Empty string when has_cv=false.

visibility.description: Visibility requirement enforced before interaction (Visibility attribute).

wait_for_ready.description: WaitForReadyArgument value. Empty string = use activity default.

scope_variables.description: Variable names referenced in scope_selector placeholders [varName].

selector_variables.description: Variable names referenced in full_selector placeholders [varName].

declared_variables.description: ObjectRepositoryVariableData entries declared on this element.

descriptor_version.description: UiPath Object Repository descriptor version as stored in .metadata (e.g. 'V4', 'V5', 'V6'). Adapter V6 handles V4/V5/V6 formats.

depth.description: Hierarchy depth: App=0, Version=1, Screen=2, Element=3+. Nested elements have depth > 3.

entry.description: Discriminated union on the 'type' field. 'screen' = V2 TargetApp. 'element' = V6 TargetAnchorable.
